architecture_summary: Add SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptEmitterDryRun as a pure Foundation Mode contract downstream of SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptHandoff. The dry-run binds scheduler, distributed lease execution, worker mesh, worker failure, and UAO refs into a simulated future runtime receipt emitter envelope while denying scheduler dispatch, runtime runner registration, dispatch endpoint registration, runtime receipt emitter registration, runtime receipt schema binding, runtime dispatch, worker invocation, scheduler mutation, backend calls, external network, filesystem writes, connector authority, terminal closure, and success claims. A deterministic validator checks schema identity, handoff source refs, authority denial flags, runtime gate refs, runtime witness refs, simulated emission result flags, admission blocking refs, receipt refs, and summary counts.
data_model_changes: add SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptEmitterDryRun schema for source receipt refs, authority scope, dry-run contract, simulated emission result, admission decision, receipt refs, summary counts, governance refs, and receipt envelope

add Foundation Mode emitter dry-run example that records no live dispatch, no worker invocation, no backend call, no filesystem write, no connector call, no runtime receipt emission, no worker mesh dispatch receipt emission, no terminal closure, and no success claim

add deterministic validator for schema artifact checks, handoff source ref checks, authority denial checks, dry-run contract ref checks, simulated emission result checks, admission decision checks, receipt ref checks, and summary count checks
rollback_plan: Remove SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptEmitterDryRun schema, Foundation example, validator, focused tests, CI gating entry, protocol manifest entry, protocol document rule/count updates, proof coverage matrix surface and generated fixture/doc changes, and SDLC evidence artifacts, then rerun schema validation, protocol manifest validation, public repository surface validation, proof coverage matrix validation, focused emitter dry-run tests, SDLC artifact validation, security review validation, release readiness validation, and workspace governance preflight.
migration_plan: No persistence, credential, scheduler, worker, distributed lease backend, deployment, external endpoint, runtime route, runner registry, emitter registry, or schema registry migration is required. The change adds a local deterministic dry-run contract and validator only.
